name: Emotional Marketing
description: Emotional marketing is a strategy that focuses on creating an emotional connection with the target audience. It involves using storytelling, imagery, and other creative elements to evoke emotions and create a lasting impression.
when_to_apply: during a war or crisis, when the target audience is more emotionally vulnerable
example: a company creates an advertising campaign that tells the story of a family affected by the war, and how the company's product or service can help them
anti_pattern: using insensitive or exploitative advertising during a war or crisis

name: Empathy-based Communication
description: Empathy-based communication involves understanding and sharing the feelings of the target audience. It requires being sensitive to the current situation and adjusting the communication strategy accordingly.
when_to_apply: during a war or crisis, when the target audience is more emotionally vulnerable
example: a company creates a social media campaign that acknowledges the difficulties faced by the target audience during a war, and offers support and resources
anti_pattern: using insensitive or exploitative language during a war or crisis
